hero.title: Jewelry Full-Cycle Generator
hero.description: Create complete jewelry marketing assets from a single design. AI generates professional product photos, lifestyle images, and stunning promotional videos—all optimized for e-commerce and social media. Perfect for jewelry brands, designers, and retailers looking to showcase their pieces with cinematic quality.

steps.title: Upload your jewelry design
steps.description: Provide a product photo of your jewelry piece. Nano Banana Pro analyzes the design details, materials, and aesthetic to create marketing-ready variations.

steps.title: Generate product imagery
steps.description: AI creates multiple product shots: clean white background photos, lifestyle images with models, and detail close-ups highlighting craftsmanship.

steps.title: Create promotional video
steps.description: Sora 2 generates a cinematic promotional video showcasing your jewelry with professional lighting, elegant movements, and premium aesthetics.

steps.title: Export complete asset set
steps.description: Download all generated assets: product photos for listings, lifestyle images for social media, and video content for advertising campaigns.

items.question: What is the Jewelry Full-Cycle Generator?
items.answer: This AI workflow creates complete marketing assets for jewelry pieces: product photography, lifestyle images, and promotional videos. It transforms a single jewelry photo into a full content set ready for e-commerce and social media.

items.question: What types of content does it generate?
items.answer: The workflow generates product photos (white background, detail shots), lifestyle images (model wearing jewelry, styled scenes), and promotional videos with cinematic quality—all from your single input image.

items.question: What AI models power this workflow?
items.answer: The workflow uses Nano Banana Pro for generating product and lifestyle images, and Sora 2 for creating cinematic promotional videos with professional lighting and elegant motion.

items.question: Does it work with all jewelry types?
items.answer: Yes, the workflow handles rings, necklaces, bracelets, earrings, watches, and other jewelry pieces. It adapts the generated content to showcase each piece type appropriately.

items.question: How long are the generated videos?
items.answer: The promotional videos are optimized for social media and advertising, typically 5-15 seconds—perfect for Instagram Reels, TikTok, and video ads.

items.question: Can I use this for my e-commerce store?
items.answer: Absolutely. The generated product photos are optimized for e-commerce platforms like Shopify, Etsy, and Amazon. The lifestyle images and videos are perfect for product pages and marketing.

items.question: How does it maintain jewelry detail accuracy?
items.answer: Nano Banana Pro carefully analyzes your jewelry's design elements—gemstones, metalwork, textures—and preserves these details across all generated images and video frames.

items.question: What input quality works best?
items.answer: A clear, well-lit photo of your jewelry piece works best. The higher the input quality, the better the generated marketing assets will showcase your jewelry's details.
